items.title: Guests are seated
items.note: Strings play softly as the hall fills

items.title: The procession
items.note: The bridal party walks in beneath the blooms

items.title: The marriage ceremony
items.note: Hymns, the vows, and the exchange of rings

items.title: Pronounced husband and wife
items.note: The blessing of the marriage and the first kiss

items.title: Photographs among the florals
items.note: Family portraits while small chops are served

items.title: Lunch in the garden
items.note: A seated meal beneath the greenery

items.title: Toasts and the cutting of the cake
items.note: Warm words from family and friends

items.title: The first dance
items.note: Then the floor opens to everyone

items.title: The sendoff
items.note: We say our thanks as the evening settles
